Our Services

Reliable Refrigerated Transport Solutions

Keeping Your Goods Fresh & Secure

We have successfully delivered thousands of shipments across Dubai, ensuring temperature-sensitive goods reach their destination in perfect condition.

On-Time, Every Time

We understand the importance of delivering perishable goods on schedule. Our fleet of chiller vans, freezer trucks, and refrigerated transport vehicles is equipped with GPS tracking and temperature monitoring to ensure timely and efficient deliveries across Dubai.

Customer Satisfaction is Our Priority

Our long-standing reputation in Dubai’s refrigerated transport industry is built on trust, reliability, and quality service. We work closely with food suppliers, pharmaceutical companies, and event planners to provide tailored solutions for their unique cooling needs.

Advanced Refrigerated Vehicles for Safe Transport

Our fleet consists of well-maintained chiller vans, freezer trucks, and temperature-controlled vehicles designed to meet diverse transportation needs. Each vehicle is equipped with advanced cooling technology, ensuring precise temperature control for perishable food, pharmaceuticals, and other sensitive cargo.

Convenient & On-Time Refrigerated Transport

We provide door-to-door refrigerated van and truck rental services, so you don’t have to worry about logistics. Whether you need a one-time delivery or a long-term contract, our flexible rental plans guarantee fast and reliable service across the Dubai.

Bulk Chiller & Freezer Transport Solutions

Handling large shipments? No problem! Our fleet includes high-capacity refrigerated trucks ideal for moving heavy loads while maintaining precise temperature control. From wholesale food products to bulk pharmaceutical supplies, we keep your cargo fresh and secure.

CHILLED INSIGHTS

News, Tips & Best Practices in Refrigerated Transport

As a leading food supplier, maintaining the freshness and quality of our products is our top priority. Freshness on Wheels

Why Choose Us:

  • Modern Fleet: Utilize specialized vehicles equipped with temperature monitoring and consignment tracking systems.​

  • Experienced Team: Employ dedicated staff trained to handle temperature-sensitive deliveries with utmost care.​

  • Timely Deliveries: Achieve a 95% on-time delivery rate, ensuring products reach their destinations fresh and intact.​

  • Competitive Pricing: Offer affordable rates without compromising on service quality, making us a preferred choice in the industry.

Reliable & Affordable

Leading Chiller Van Rental Company in Dubai

At Refrigerator Transport, we go beyond just being a chiller van rental company in Dubai—we strive to deliver excellence. From chiller vans and refrigerated trucks to cold storage containers, we provide the most affordable and efficient temperature-controlled transportation solutions across Dubai and the UAE.

No matter how hot the weather gets or how far your delivery destination is, our experienced drivers and dedicated management ensure that your products stay cool, fresh, and in perfect condition, keeping both you and your customers satisfied.

Customer satisfaction is at the heart of our service. We focus on affordability, reliability, and top-tier customer care, ensuring that our service quality always exceeds expectations.

Whether you’re in the food and restaurant industry or the health and medical sector, we provide the most convenient, cost-effective, and high-quality chiller van rental solutions tailored to your needs.
